title: Božidar Kolaković - Wikipedia
body: Božidar Kolaković Personal information Full name Božidar Kolaković Date of birth ( 1929-12-08 ) 8 December 1929 Place of birth Sisak , Yugoslavia Date of death 17 October 2010 (2010-10-17) (aged 80) Place of death Offenbach am Main , Germany Position Defender Senior career* Years Team Apps ( Gls ) 1946–1949 Lokomotiva Zagreb 1950–1954 Partizan 44 (1) 1955–1957 Proleter Osijek 1957–1959 Hajduk Kula International career 1951 Yugoslavia 1 (0) * Club domestic league appearances and goals Božidar Kolaković ( Cyrillic : Божидар Колаковић; 8 December 1929 – 17 October 2010) was a footballer most notably with FK Partizan and in the Yugoslavia national team . [ 1 ] International career [ edit ] He made his debut for Yugoslavia in a February 1951 friendly match away against France , which remained his sole international appearance.
